song.title: He’s got the whole world in his hands
song.lyrics:
[V1] He's got the whole world in His hands He's got the whole world in His hands He's got the whole world in His hands He's got the whole world in His hands
[V2] He's got the wind and rain in His hands He's got the wind and rain in His hands He's got the wind and rain in His hands He's got the whole world in His hands
[V3] He’s go the tiny little baby in His hands He’s go the tiny little baby in His hands He’s go the tiny little baby in His hands He’s got the whole world in His hands
[V4] He’s got you and be brother in His hands He’s got you and be brother in His hands He’s got you and be brother in His hands He’s got the whole world in His hands
